Does this repo prove what it claims? Use the checked-in Cautilus workflow.

Confirm the scan scope, run the first claim discovery scan, inspect the saved claim map, then classify what the discovery found. Report which entry-doc signals were used, how source refs and duplicate fingerprints are handled, and which next-work buckets should guide human or agent follow-up. Stop before claim review prepare-input, reviewer launch, eval execution, edits, or commits.
